# Cold Call Script

## Opener

Hi, is the owner or manager available for a quick question?

If connected:

Hi {{name}}, my name is {{your_name}}. I help small local businesses get simple, professional websites online. I noticed {{business_name}} is active on {{platform}}, but I did not see a strong standalone website yet, so I wanted to ask if that is something you have been meaning to fix.

## If They Say "Maybe" or "We Have Been Thinking About It"

That makes sense. What I usually do is create a simple concept based on the public business information already out there, then I walk the owner through it and turn it into a finished site only if it makes sense for them.

Would you be open to a short call later this week so I can show you what that could look like?

## If They Ask the Price

Most of my small business sites fall into a simple range depending on page count and how much content support is needed. Starter sites usually begin around {{starter_price}} and go up from there.

## If They Say "Send Something"

Absolutely. What is the best email for you, and who should I address it to?

## Close

Thanks for your time. I will send a short note and keep it simple.

## Rules

- keep it manual,
- do not pressure,
- do not misrepresent,
- stop if asked not to call again,
- log the result immediately after the call.
